title: Proclamation No. 869, s. 2014
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 869

DECLARING FRIDAY, 5 SEPTEMBER 2014, AS A SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE CITY OF GENERAL SANTOS

WHEREAS, Friday, 5 September 2014, marks the celebration of the 46 th Charter Day anniversary and 16 th Tuna Festival in the City of General Santos;

WHEREAS, in order to give the people of the City of General Santos the opportunity to celebrate and participate in the occasion, it is but fitting and proper to declare 5 September 2014 as a special non-working day.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, PAQUITO N. OCHOA JR., Executive Secretary, by authority of His Excellency, BENIGNO S. AQUINO III, do hereby declare Friday, 5 September 2014, as a special (non-working) day in the City of General Santos.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 3rd day of September, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Fourteen.

By the authority of the President:

(Sgd.) PAQUITO N. OCHOA JR. Executive Secretary
